tg.exp_basis: amorphous atactic PS Tg 373 K (100 C) +/-5%.
tg.reliability: UNRELIABLE (2 fast rates only, 108 K scatter, slope-gate FAIL)
tg.tg_note: single_rate_fallback off rates [400,160]->[328,436.9]; loglinear slope b=-118.8 (wrong sign) so gate correctly failed. 436.9 is rate-inflated (lacks the slow 40 K/ns rate PS1/PS3 have). run_summary had mislabeled this 'rate_extrapolated' and carried NO exp band. PS Tg STRADDLES exp across replicates (376-437 K): the well-resolved slow/single fits (PS1 375.9, PS3 376.5) land at exp; the runs lacking a clean slow rate (PS2 2 fast rates, PS4 noisy) inflate +11%.

density.exp_basis: amorphous atactic PS 1.05 g/cm3 +/-5% (polymer_rules PSTR), at 300 K (measured target_temp_K=300, actual ~300.0).
density.density_note: MARGINAL FAIL: graded -2.3% past the 0.9975 floor (~-7.2% vs the 1.05 midpoint) = documented aromatic-PCFF underdensity, PEEK-style, NOT a cliff. Cells ARE equilibrated at 300 K (drift<0.22%, sem pass, homogeneous) -> NOT under-equilibration. Under-dense cell is COHERENT with the low K (under-packed -> soft), unlike PMMA's incoherent low-density/high-K.

bulk_modulus.exp_basis: K_T [3.3,4.0] GPa, glassy aPS 25 C (Mark2007 Tait/Zoller1978); supersedes the stale K_S [3.5,5.5].
bulk_modulus.method_note: Murnaghan primary, +/-1000 atm, converged (B0'=13.47, high from the narrow window -- same inflation as PMMA/PEEK). FAIL-low -26.0% vs K_T floor 3.3. ALL PS K land 2.4-3.0 GPa (-10 to -26%), a systematic underestimate COHERENT with the ~-6% underdensity (under-packed cells are softer). K is NOT a headline PASS for PS.

provenance.review_note: PS replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: Tg is the headline (PS1 375.9 + PS3 376.5 PASS at well-resolved slow/single fits; PS2/PS4 inflate +11% lacking a clean slow rate). Density MARGINAL FAIL x4 (aromatic-PCFF underdensity at 300 K) and K FAIL x4 (2.4-3.0 GPa) are COHERENT (under-packed -> soft). PS1 K corrected: the reported 3.85 'fluctuation' PASS was the REMOVED Born value -> real fluctuation 2.71 FAIL. PS2 relabeled from bandless 'rate_extrapolated' to single_rate_fallback with K_T/Tg bands applied.
